How we work together

Ways to find
your sanctuary.

Whether you're navigating a career pivot, working through workplace trauma, or simply ready to grow, there's a path designed for exactly where you are right now.

01

Individual support

1:1 Coaching

Real, one-on-one support designed to meet you exactly where you are. Together we'll clarify your vision, name the barriers, and build a strategy that honors your full self.

Here's what you get

Deep-dive discovery session to map your goals and challenges

Bi-weekly 60-minute coaching sessions

Personalized action plans and resource recommendations

Ongoing support between sessions via messaging

Trauma-informed, culturally affirming approach throughout

Book a Discovery Call →
02

Community-powered growth

Group Coaching

A supportive circle of sisters growing together. Group coaching brings the power of shared experience, guided through structured conversations, reflection, and collective strategy.

Here's what you get

Small cohort of 6 to 10 women for intimate community

Weekly facilitated group sessions

Peer accountability partnerships

Access to shared resources and frameworks

Private community space between sessions

Join the Waitlist →
03

Skill-building and community

Workshops and Events

Engaging, affirming spaces designed to nourish your mind, empower your path, and build real connection. From the microaggressions workshop to community events, each experience is built to give you tools you can actually use.

Current offerings

How to Navigate Microaggressions for Women — signature workshop

Career wellness panels and community conversations

Virtual and in-person formats available

Corporate and organizational bookings available

See Upcoming Events →

How it works

From first step to flourishing.

01

Discovery

We start with a free call to understand where you are, where you want to go, and which path makes most sense for you right now.

02

Alignment

Together we build clarity, naming your vision, your values, and the specific barriers that have been getting in the way.

03

Strategy

We build your roadmap with practical, culturally grounded tools and action steps that work in the real world you're actually living in.

04

Momentum

Ongoing support, accountability, and a community that keeps cheering you forward, because transformation doesn't happen in a single session.

Not sure where to begin?

Book a free discovery call and we'll figure it out together. No pressure, just an honest conversation about what you need.

Book a Free Discovery Call
